name: Hack Squat (Machine)
instructions: Set your shoulders and back against the machine's pads and place your feet on the platform shoulder-width apart.
Release the safety handles and lower by bending your knees until your thighs are about parallel to the platform.
Drive through your heels to press back up without locking the knees hard.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Pendulum Squat
instructions: Position your back and shoulders against the pads and set your feet on the platform.
Unlock the machine and lower under control as the arc swings you down.
Descend until your thighs pass parallel, keeping your heels planted.
Press back up through the platform to the start.

name: Belt Squat
instructions: Fasten the belt around your hips and stand on the platform with feet shoulder-width apart.
Release the lever and squat down by bending your hips and knees.
Lower until your thighs are about parallel, keeping your torso upright.
Drive up through your heels to stand.

name: Pec Deck (Machine Fly)
instructions: Sit with your back flat against the pad and grasp the handles at chest height.
Bring the handles together in front of your chest by squeezing your pecs.
Pause briefly at the contraction.
Return under control until you feel a stretch across the chest.

name: Reverse Pec Deck (Rear Delt Machine)
instructions: Sit facing the pad and grasp the handles with arms extended in front of you.
Pull the handles back in a wide arc by squeezing your rear delts and upper back.
Pause when your arms are out to the sides.
Return slowly to the start.

name: Chest-Supported Row (Machine)
instructions: Set the chest pad so your torso is supported and grasp the handles.
Row the handles toward you by driving your elbows back and squeezing your shoulder blades.
Pause at full contraction.
Lower under control to a full stretch.

name: Assisted Triceps Dip (Machine)
instructions: Set the assistance weight and place your knees on the pad, gripping the dip handles.
Keep your torso fairly upright to bias the triceps.
Lower until your elbows reach about 90 degrees.
Press back up by extending your elbows.

name: Hip Thrust (Machine)
instructions: Sit in the machine with the pad across your hips and your feet planted.
Drive your hips up by squeezing your glutes until your thighs are level.
Pause at the top.
Lower under control without letting the weight rest.

name: Barbell Hip Thrust
instructions: Sit on the floor with your upper back against a bench and roll a padded barbell over your hips.
Plant your feet flat, shoulder-width apart.
Drive through your heels and squeeze your glutes to lift your hips until your torso is parallel to the floor.
Pause, then lower under control.

name: Glute Kickback (Machine)
instructions: Brace your torso against the pad and place one foot on the lever.
Push the lever back and up by squeezing your glute.
Pause at full extension.
Return under control and repeat, then switch sides.

name: Ab Crunch (Machine)
instructions: Sit with your back against the pad and grasp the handles by your shoulders.
Crunch forward by contracting your abs, curling your chest toward your hips.
Pause at the bottom of the crunch.
Return slowly to the start.

name: Cable Crunch
instructions: Kneel below a high pulley with a rope attachment held by your head.
Crunch down by contracting your abs, bringing your elbows toward your thighs.
Pause at the fully contracted position.
Return slowly, keeping tension on the abs.

name: Nordic Hamstring Curl
instructions: Kneel upright with your ankles anchored under a pad or held by a partner.
Keeping your hips extended and body straight, lower your torso toward the floor as slowly as possible.
Catch yourself with your hands when you can no longer resist.
Push off lightly and use your hamstrings to pull yourself back up.

name: Reverse Nordic Curl
instructions: Kneel upright with your torso tall and core braced.
Keeping your hips extended, lean backward by bending only at the knees.
Lower as far as your quads allow under control.
Contract your quads to return to upright.

name: Copenhagen Plank
instructions: Set up in a side plank with your top leg resting on a bench at about knee height.
Lift your hips and bottom leg off the floor so you're supported by your forearm and top leg.
Squeeze your inner thigh to hold a straight line.
Hold for time, then switch sides.

name: JM Press
instructions: Lie on a flat bench holding a barbell with a shoulder-width grip, arms extended.
Lower the bar toward your upper neck by tucking your elbows, a hybrid of a press and a skull crusher.
Stop when your forearms near your biceps.
Press the bar back up by extending your triceps.

name: Squeeze Press
instructions: Lie on a flat bench pressing two dumbbells together hard in the center.
Keeping them pressed together, lower to your chest, then press up.
Maintain inward pressure the whole set.

name: Meadows Row
instructions: Stand perpendicular to a landmine barbell and grip the sleeve with one hand.
Hinge over with a flat back and row the end of the bar up toward your hip.
Lower under control; finish the set, then switch sides.

name: Seal Row
instructions: Lie face-down on a bench raised high enough for the bar to hang at arm’s length.
Row the bar up to the underside of the bench by driving your elbows back.
Pause, then lower to a full stretch.

name: Kroc Row
instructions: Brace on a bench or rack and grip a heavy dumbbell with one hand.
Row explosively to your hip, allowing a little body english for high reps.
Control the descent; switch sides.

name: Chest-Supported Dumbbell Row
instructions: Lie chest-down on an incline bench holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Row both dumbbells up by driving your elbows back and squeezing your shoulder blades.
Lower under control to a full stretch.

name: Snatch-Grip Deadlift
instructions: Take a very wide (snatch) grip on the bar with a flat back and hips set.
Drive through the floor and stand tall, keeping the bar close.
Lower under control to the floor.

name: Deficit Deadlift
instructions: Stand on a low platform so the bar starts a couple inches lower than normal.
Brace, push the floor away, and stand tall.
Lower under control.

name: Cable Face Pull
instructions: Set a rope at upper-chest height and grip it with both hands, palms in.
Pull the rope toward your face, splitting your hands apart and squeezing the rear delts.
Return under control.

name: Viking Press
instructions: Set up at a landmine or viking press handle at chest height, neutral grip.
Press the handle up and slightly forward to lockout.
Lower under control.

name: Landmine Press
instructions: Hold the end of a landmine barbell at shoulder height, staggered stance.
Press the bar up and forward until your arm is extended.
Lower under control; switch sides if pressing single-arm.

name: Z Press
instructions: Sit on the floor with legs straight and the bar at your shoulders.
Brace hard and press overhead without leaning back.
Lower to your shoulders under control.

name: Bayesian Cable Curl
instructions: Face away from a low pulley, handle in one hand, arm extended behind you.
Curl the handle up while keeping your upper arm back to maximize the stretch.
Lower slowly; switch sides.

name: Waiter Curl
instructions: Hold a single dumbbell vertically in both hands, cupping the top plate.
Curl it up to shoulder height keeping elbows in.
Lower slowly.

name: Overhead Cable Triceps Extension
instructions: Face away from a high pulley with a rope, elbows up by your ears.
Extend your arms overhead until straight, keeping elbows still.
Return under control.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Stand a couple feet in front of a bench, rear foot laces-down on it, a dumbbell in each hand.
Lower straight down by bending your front knee until your back knee nears the floor.
Drive up through your front heel; finish the set, then switch legs.

name: Curtsy Lunge
instructions: Stand tall holding dumbbells; step one foot back and across behind the other.
Lower into a lunge, keeping your front knee tracking over your foot.
Return to standing; alternate sides.

name: Smith Machine Lunge
instructions: Set the bar across your upper back in a Smith machine, one foot forward in a split stance.
Lower straight down until your back knee nears the floor.
Drive up; finish the set, then switch legs.

name: Reverse Lunge
instructions: Stand tall holding dumbbells.
Step one foot straight back and lower until both knees are bent ~90 degrees.
Drive through the front heel to return; alternate sides.

name: Standing Leg Curl
instructions: Stand in the machine with one ankle behind the pad, torso supported.
Curl your heel toward your glute by contracting the hamstring.
Lower under control; switch legs.

name: Frog Pump
instructions: Lie on your back with the soles of your feet together and knees out.
Drive your hips up by squeezing your glutes.
Lower under control and repeat for high reps.

name: Jefferson Curl
instructions: Stand on a box holding a light weight, feet hip-width.
Slowly roll down one vertebra at a time, letting the weight hang toward your feet.
Reverse the motion to roll back up. Use light loads.

name: Spanish Squat
instructions: Loop a heavy band around a post and the back of your knees, leaning back into it.
Squat straight down keeping your shins vertical.
Drive back up through your heels.

name: Tibialis Raise
instructions: Stand with your back to a wall, heels a step out and weight on your heels.
Pull your toes up toward your shins as high as possible.
Lower under control.

name: Toes to Bar
instructions: Hang from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip.
Keeping legs fairly straight, raise your toes up to touch the bar.
Lower under control without swinging.

name: Hollow Body Hold
instructions: Lie on your back and press your lower back into the floor.
Lift your shoulders and legs, arms overhead, into a shallow banana shape.
Hold, breathing steadily.

name: Dragon Flag
instructions: Lie on a bench gripping behind your head for support.
Brace and lift your whole body so only your upper back stays on the bench.
Lower under control without letting your hips sag.

name: Cable Woodchopper
instructions: Set a high pulley and grip the handle with both hands.
Pull diagonally down and across your body to the opposite hip, rotating your torso.
Return under control; finish the set, then switch sides.

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
instructions: Kneel holding an ab wheel under your shoulders.
Roll forward as far as you can control while bracing your core, keeping your hips from sagging.
Pull back to the start using your abs.

name: Cable Pallof Press
instructions: Stand side-on to a cable at chest height, handle held at your sternum with both hands.
Press the handle straight out, resisting the pull to rotate.
Return to your chest; finish the set, then switch sides.

name: Suitcase Carry
instructions: Hold a heavy dumbbell in one hand at your side.
Walk with an upright, level torso, resisting the lean to one side.
Switch hands and repeat.

name: Sled Push
instructions: Load a sled and grip the high or low handles, arms extended.
Drive it forward with powerful steps, staying low.
Keep a steady, hard pace for the distance.

name: Sled Drag
instructions: Attach a strap to a sled and walk forward (or backward) dragging it.
Take strong steps, leaning into the resistance.
Backward drags bias the quads; forward bias the posterior chain.

name: Plate Pinch Hold
instructions: Pinch one or two weight plates together (smooth side out) between your fingers and thumb.
Stand tall and hold for time without letting them slip.
Lower under control; switch hands.

name: Behind-the-Back Wrist Curl
instructions: Stand holding a barbell behind your glutes with an overhand grip.
Let the bar roll to your fingertips, then curl it up by flexing your wrists.
Lower under control.

name: Neck Curl
instructions: Lie face-up on a bench with your head off the end, a light plate on your forehead (use a towel).
Lower your head back, then curl your chin toward your chest.
Move slowly through a comfortable range.

name: Neck Extension
instructions: Lie face-down on a bench with your head off the end, a light plate held on the back of your head.
Lower your chin toward your chest, then extend your head back up.
Move slowly and avoid jerking.

name: Kelso Shrug
instructions: Lie chest-down on an incline bench holding dumbbells, arms hanging.
Retract your shoulder blades, shrugging the weights up without bending your elbows.
Lower under control.

name: Kas Glute Bridge
instructions: Set up like a hip thrust but start with hips already raised, shins vertical.
Lower a few inches and drive back up, keeping constant tension on the glutes.
Use a short range and squeeze hard at the top.

name: B-Stance Hip Thrust
instructions: Set up for a hip thrust but stagger your feet, the working leg flat and the other as a light kickstand.
Drive through the working heel to lift your hips, squeezing that glute.
Lower under control; switch sides.

name: B-Stance Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Stagger your stance, most weight on the front leg, the back foot a light kickstand.
Hinge at the hips, lowering the weights down the front leg.
Drive your hips forward to stand; switch sides.

name: Single-Leg Hip Thrust
instructions: Rest your upper back on a bench with one foot planted and the other leg extended.
Drive through the planted heel to lift your hips, squeezing the glute.
Lower under control; switch legs.

name: Hip Airplane
instructions: Balance on one leg with a soft knee, hinged forward at the hip.
Rotate your hips open and closed under control while staying balanced.
Keep the motion slow; switch legs.

name: Shrimp Squat
instructions: Stand on one leg, holding the other foot behind you with the same-side hand.
Squat down until your trailing knee lightly touches the floor.
Drive back up; switch legs.

name: Bird Dog
instructions: Start on all fours with a flat back and braced core.
Extend your opposite arm and leg until level, without letting your hips rotate.
Return under control and alternate sides.

name: Pseudo Planche Push-up
instructions: Set up in a push-up with hands by your waist, fingers pointed back, leaning forward over your hands.
Lower your chest while keeping the forward lean.
Press back up, maintaining the lean throughout.

name: Dead Hang
instructions: Hang from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, arms straight and shoulders active.
Relax your lower body and hold for time.
Drop down under control.

name: Battle Ropes
instructions: Hold one end of a heavy rope in each hand, knees softly bent.
Whip the ropes up and down (or in waves) as fast as you can sustain.
Keep a braced core for the work interval.

name: Assault Bike (Air Bike)
instructions: Sit on a fan/air bike and grip the moving handles.
Drive with your legs and push-pull the handles together.
Work at the target pace or interval.

name: Jumping Jacks
instructions: Stand tall, then jump your feet out while raising your arms overhead.
Jump back to the start.
Repeat at a steady rhythm.
